headpiece/part.def: 頭飾、頭盔、(專)卷首裝飾人物 (單數) (飾)

headquarters/base.def: 總部、司令部、(喻)中心人物 (單數) (部)

headrest/seat.def: (汽)頭枕、(喻)靠頭物人物 (單數) (枕)

headroom/space.def: 淨空高度、(汽)頂部空間、(喻)發展空間人物 (單數) (空)
headroom/space.ex: There is little headroom in the_tunnel.

headscarf/cloth.def: 頭巾、(宗)女用頭巾人物 (單數) (巾)
headscarf/cloth.ex: She wore a colorful headscarf today.

headship/leader.def: 首領地位、(英)校長職位人物 (單數) (職)

head-s_hot/photo.def: 頭部照片、特寫照人物 (單數) (照)

head-s_pace/space.def: (心/俚)心理空間、(專)頂隙人物 (單數) (間)
head-s_pace/space.ex: I need some head-s_pace to think.

headstall/rope.def: (馬)籠頭、韁繩的頭部人物 (單數) (籠)

headstone/tomb.def: 墓碑、(喻)基石人物 (單數) (碑)

headstrong/tough.def: 頑固的、剛愎自用的、(喻)任性地的人的人物 (單數) (頑)
headstrong/tough.ex: She was headstrong as a teenager.

headway/move.def: 進展、(海)前進之勢、(鐵)行車間隔人物 (單數) (進)
headway/move.ex: We are making little headway with the_task.

headwind/wind.def: 逆風、(喻)阻力人物 (單數) (風)

heady/fast/strong.def: 使人興奮的、(酒)易醉的、(喻)輕率地的人的人物 (單數) (烈/興)

heal/well/get.def: 治癒、(喻)消除、痊癒的人的人 (痊/合)
heal/well/get.ex: The_wound took a long time to heal.

heal-.def: 全、好的人的人人物 (單數) (全)

healer/doctor.def: 醫治者、(宗)神醫、(喻)補救物人物 (單數) (員)

healing/well.def: 康復的、醫治的人物、痊癒地的人的人 (或物) (痊)

health/well/body.def: 健康、衛生、(喻)興旺的人物、祝健康的人物 (單數) (康/衛)
health/well/body.col: health care, mental health, in good health, public health
health/well/body.ex: Exercise is good for your health.

health-.def: 健的人的人人物 (單數) (健)

healthy/well/strong.def: 健康的、健壯的、(喻)有益地的人的人物 (單數) (康/健)
healthy/well/strong.ex: A healthy mind in a healthy body.

heap/huge/set.def: 堆、大量的人物、(口)破車人物、堆積、(俚)給予的人的人 (堆/量)
heap/huge/set.col: heap of rubbish, bottom of the_heap, heaps of time
heap/huge/set.ex: Books were piled in a heap on floor.

hearing/ear/listen.def: 聽覺、審判人物、(喻)發言機會人物、聽見地的人的人 (或物) (聽/審)
hearing/ear/listen.col: hearing aid, hard of hearing, public hearing
hearing/ear/listen.ex: My hearing is not as good as it was.

hearsay/talk.def: 傳聞、謠言人物、傳聞地的人的人物 (單數) (傳)

hearse/car.def: 靈車、(喻)葬禮馬車人物 (單數) (車)
hearse/car.ex: A slow black hearse led the_procession.

heart/body/center/love.def: 心、(喻)重心的人物、勇氣的人物、(牌)紅桃人物、衷心地的人的人 (心/核/勇/紅)
heart/body/center/love.col: at heart, by heart (背誦), loose heart (洩氣), take it to heart, heart attack

heart-.def: 心的人的人人物 (單數) (心)

heartbeat.def: 心跳、(喻)中心、動力來源人物 (單數) (跳/源)
heartbeat.ex: In a heartbeat, it was over.

heartbreak/sadness.def: 心碎、極度悲傷人物 (單數) (碎)

heart-break-ing/sad.def: 令人心碎的、極悲慘地的人的人物 (單數) (慘)

heart-broken/sad.def: 心碎的、傷心欲絕地的人的人 (或物) (碎)
heart-broken/sad.ex: He was heart-broken when she left.

heart-burn/body.def: (醫)胃灼熱、心口灼熱、(喻)妒忌人物 (單數) (灼)
heart-burn/body.ex: Too many spic-y foods cause heart-burn.

hearten/good.def: 鼓舞、激勵、(喻)使高興的人的人 (勵/歡)
hearten/good.ex: I was hearten-ed by your support.

heart-felt/good.def: 真誠的、衷心地的人的人物 (單數) (誠)
heart-felt/good.ex: Our heart-felt thanks to all of you.

hearth/place/fire.def: 壁爐邊、灶臺、(喻)家、家庭人物 (單數) (灶/家)
hearth/place/fire.ex: A warm fire burning on the_hearth.

hearti-ness/goodness.def: 衷心、熱誠、強健人物 (單數) (誠)

heartland/center.def: 心臟地帶、中心、腹地人物 (單數) (核)

heartless/bad.def: 無情的、冷酷地的人的人物 (單數) (酷)
heartless/bad.ex: That was a heartless thing to do.
